hero.title: Share Code in Real-time with Developers
hero.subtitle: An online code editor for interviews, troubleshooting, teaching & more…

howItWorks.title: How Live Share Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Live share your code in just 4 simple steps
howItWorks.step1Desc: Click "Share Code Now" to live share code
howItWorks.step3Desc: Paste or write your code with syntax highlighting
howItWorks.step4Desc: Live share your unique link for real-time collaboration

features.teamDesc: Open a LiveShare editor, write or copy code, then share it with friends and colleagues. Pair program and troubleshoot together.
features.interviewDesc: Set coding tasks and observe in real-time when interviewing remotely or in person. Nobody likes writing code on a whiteboard.
features.teachDesc: Share your code with students and peers then educate them. Universities and colleges around the world use LiveShare every day.

whyChoose.title: Why Choose LiveShare?
whyChoose.instantDesc: No sign-up required. Share code in seconds.
whyChoose.syntaxDesc: Beautiful highlighting for all popular languages.
whyChoose.passwordDesc: Secure your code with optional password protection.

cta.subtitle: The fastest way to share code, collaborate in real-time, and build amazing things together.

whyDevs.title: Why Developers Choose LiveShare
whyDevs.subtitle: Experience the future of code collaboration with features designed for modern development teams.
whyDevs.fastDesc: Share code instantly with a single click. No waiting, no setup, no hassle. Get your collaborative workspace ready in seconds.
whyDevs.syncDesc: See changes instantly as your team codes together. Perfect for pair programming, code reviews, and remote collaboration.
whyDevs.secureDesc: Password-protect your sessions and control who can access your code. Your collaboration stays private and secure.

howWorks.title: How LiveShare Works
howWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to start collaborating
howWorks.step1Desc: Click "Start Coding Live" and get a unique URL instantly. Choose your programming language and start coding.
howWorks.step2Desc: Send your unique LiveShare URL to anyone you want to collaborate with. No sign-up required for participants.
howWorks.step3Desc: Collaborate in real-time. See changes instantly, discuss code, and build amazing things together.

perfectFor.title: Perfect For Every Developer
perfectFor.subtitle: From interviews to education, LiveShare adapts to your workflow
perfectFor.interviewDesc: Conduct technical interviews with live code assessment
perfectFor.teamDesc: Debug, review, and build features together seamlessly
perfectFor.teachDesc: Share code examples and teach programming concepts
perfectFor.openSourceDesc: Contribute to projects and get help from the community

footer.usedBy: Used by software engineers at companies and universities we respect and admire.
footer.copyright: © 2025 Live Share - Free Online Code Editor and Live Code Sharing Platform

editor.welcomeComment:
// Welcome to LiveShare!
// Start typing here...
editor.tipDesc: Use Ctrl + ↑/↓ to adjust font size
editor.linkCopiedDesc: Share this link with others to collaborate
editor.codeCopiedDesc: Code has been copied to clipboard
editor.errorSaveSnippet: Failed to save changes. Check your connection.
editor.codeProtectedDesc: Share the password with people you want to give access.
editor.protectionRemovedDesc: Anyone with the link can now access this code.
editor.notifEnabledDescDesktop: You'll now receive notifications for collaborator activity.
editor.notifEnabledDescMobile: You'll receive notifications when collaborators join/leave and the app is in the background.
editor.notifBlockedMobileHint: On mobile, check your browser settings and ensure you're using HTTPS.
editor.notifBlockedSuffix: You can enable them in your browser settings.
editor.notifRequireHttpsDesc: For security reasons, mobile browsers require HTTPS for notifications. Please use the secure version of the site.
editor.notifSetupFailedDesc: There was an issue setting up notifications. Please try again.
editor.draftRecoveryDesc: A local draft from {{when}} is newer than the saved version.

feedback.title: We'd love your feedback
feedback.thankYou: Thank you! Your feedback has been sent.
feedback.emailNotConfigured: Email service not configured. Please add EmailJS env variables.
feedback.sendError: Failed to send feedback. Please try again.

password.updateDesc: Update the password or remove protection from this code snippet.
password.setDesc: Set a password to protect your code. Share this password with people you want to give access.
password.errorShort: Password must be at least 4 characters
password.protectedDesc: This code snippet is password protected. Enter the password to view and edit.
password.tooManyAttempts: Too many failed attempts. Please refresh and try again.
